report.implementation_summary: Implemented a controlled Codex execution adapter with safe manual-handoff default, explicit local-command allowlisting, timeout metadata, token-gate enforcement, prompt freshness checks, captured output references, and structured report enforcement. Wired the adapter into the pipeline RUN_CODEX branch and added focused tests for policy, adapter, and runner behavior.
